description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a dark gray gable roof and light gray horizontal siding. The front facade features a small covered entryway with a triangular overhang, supported by simple posts, leading to a recessed front door. There are multiple rectangular windows with white trim distributed across all visible sides, with the largest window located on the front right. The roof extends over the entryway, creating a modest porch area, and a smaller gable section is visible on the left side, suggesting an additional room or extension. The house sits on a flat base, with no visible foundation or steps, and the overall design is simple and functional, typical of North American ranch-style homes. The exterior materials appear to be asphalt shingles for the roof and vinyl or wood siding for the walls.
description: A single-story house with a dark gable roof, light gray siding, and a small covered entryway. Multiple rectangular windows and a simple, functional design evoke a suburban ranch style.
description_view_0: The rear side of the house, showing three evenly spaced windows and the main gable roof.
description_view_1: The front of the house, featuring the main entryway with a triangular overhang, a front door, and a large window to the right.
description_view_2: The opposite gable end with two windows and a side door, plus a small roof extension on the left.
description_view_3: The side of the house with four evenly spaced windows and the uninterrupted expanse of the main roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed front door with a small triangular gable overhang and no visible steps or porch railing.
